meta.description: 90-day human performance coaching platform. Affine (forked, stripped) provides the Notion-like UI shell. Discord is the primary client check-in interface. NeonDB is the data layer. Backend API is the automation brain.
meta.architecture_summary: Affine fork (UI only, no Affine backend) + NeonDB Postgres + BetterAuth + Hono API + Discord.js bot + Railway (API + bot) + Vercel (Affine frontend)

ui_shell.purpose: Provides Notion-like UI — document editor, grid/database views, page sidebar navigation, page hierarchy
what_to_strip: Real-time multiplayer/collaboration (awareness, CRDT sync beyond local)
Desktop Electron app (apps/electron) — web only for v1
ui_shell.integration_requirement: Affine runs as UI shell only. All data reads/writes go through our backend API, not Affine's own backend. Affine's local state syncs to our NeonDB via API calls.

backend.purpose: All business logic, automation jobs, AI calls, Discord bot communication, data access

stack.auth: BetterAuth — replaces Affine's native account system

ai.weekly_summaries: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 (higher quality, used once per week per client only)
ai.note: All AI calls made from backend only — never from frontend or bot directly

stack.jobs: node-cron (inside backend Railway service — no external orchestration)

coach.description: Admin. Full access to all clients, intervention queue, master dashboard, templates, reports, onboarding.

client.description: End user. Sees only their own workspace in Affine. Cannot access other clients or coach admin views.

clients.description: Extended profile for client users. Single source of truth for all automation. Every cron job and bot action reads from this table first.

columns.user_id: uuid REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
columns.program_end_date: date GENERATED ALWAYS AS (program_start_date + INTERVAL '90 days') STORED

program_phases.description: Master weekly protocol targets for all 12 weeks. Seeded once. Not per-client — clients advance through this shared schedule.

check_ins.description: Every check-in submitted via Discord. One row per event. Written by backend after bot receives photo and AI analysis completes.

columns.client_id: uuid REFERENCES clients(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

calendar_events.description: Per-client calendar. Auto-populated by cron jobs. Drives the calendar view in the Affine portal.

columns.client_id: uuid REFERENCES clients(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
columns.title: text NOT NULL

interventions.description: Intervention queue. System auto-creates entries when alert conditions trigger. Coach reviews, edits if needed, approves. Bot delivers to client Discord channel.

columns.client_id: uuid REFERENCES clients(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

intervention_templates.description: 25 reusable intervention message templates. System selects based on trigger condition, personalises with client data via Groq, coach reviews draft.

seed_data.name: Morning Exercise Slipping
seed_data.message_template: Hey {{name}}, I noticed morning exercise has been tough this week ({{adherence}}% adherence). Let's talk about what's getting in the way — is it energy, timing, or motivation?

seed_data.name: 2 Missed Check-Ins
seed_data.message_template: Hey {{name}}, just checking in — missed your last two check-ins. Everything okay? Drop a quick reply when you get a chance.

seed_data.name: 3+ Missed Check-Ins
seed_data.message_template: {{name}}, it's been {{days}} days since your last check-in. I want to make sure you're supported — reply here or let me know if you need to pause.

seed_data.name: Weekly Adherence Drop
seed_data.message_template: Weekly check — you're at {{adherence}}% this week. The data shows {{weakness}} is the main gap. Here's a simplified protocol for the next 3 days...

seed_data.name: Phase Transition
seed_data.message_template: You're entering Week {{week}} — here's what changes: wake time moves to {{wake_time}}, caffeine cutoff tightens to {{caffeine_cutoff}}. Your new morning routine card has been updated.

seed_data.name: Sleep Quality Declining
seed_data.message_template: Your sleep scores have been {{avg_score}} the past few days. A couple of things to check: post-exercise temperature, screen time after 9pm, and your caffeine cutoff.

seed_data.name: Peak Window Not Shifting
seed_data.message_template: After {{weeks}} weeks, your peak is still around {{current_peak}} rather than {{target_peak}}. Let's review morning light adherence — that's usually the lever.

seed_data.name: Week 2 Milestone
seed_data.message_template: Week 2 check — time to submit your 7-day sleep diary and energy log. Head to your portal to complete the assessment.

seed_data.name: Week 4 Full Review
seed_data.message_template: Week 4 review — you've been on protocol for a month. Let's measure the shift. Please complete the MEQ re-test + energy log in your portal.

seed_data.name: 7-Day Streak
seed_data.message_template: Excellent — 7-day adherence at {{adherence}}%. Your data shows peak window moving earlier by {{minutes}} minutes. Keep this up through the weekend.

weekly_summaries.description: Auto-generated coach summaries every Sunday night via Claude Sonnet. Coach reviews Monday morning.

columns.client_id: uuid REFERENCES clients(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

milestones.description: Assessment snapshots at weeks 2, 4, 6, 8, 12. Enables baseline vs current comparison.

columns.client_id: uuid REFERENCES clients(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

notifications.description: In-portal notification log. Powers the notification bell in the Affine UI.

columns.user_id: uuid REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
columns.title: text NOT NULL

affine_fork.strategy: Fork → strip → expose internal data bridge API → deploy as UI shell only

remove_packages: packages/backend/server — entire Affine Cloud backend (replaced by our Hono API)
disable_features: Real-time multiplayer awareness (keep local state only)
Affine account login (replace login screen with BetterAuth)
add: BetterAuth session integration — replace Affine auth context with BetterAuth JWT
Data bridge layer — thin adapter that intercepts Affine page/database read-write calls and routes them to our backend API instead of Affine's backend
FlowState branding — replace Affine logo, colours, and typography
Role-based workspace routing — coach sees admin workspace, client sees their own workspace only

pages.title: Dashboard
pages.content: KPI tiles, this week targets, last 3 check-ins, calendar widget — all data-driven from API

pages.title: My Profile & KPIs
pages.content: Onboarding data, KPI table pulling from check_ins, program overview

pages.title: My Calendar
pages.content: Full calendar view of check-in events — colour coded, linked to check-in records

pages.title: Progress
pages.content: Adherence trend, energy/focus charts, sleep trend, milestone comparisons

pages.title: Check-In History
pages.content: Full log of all Discord check-ins with AI feedback and photo

pages.title: Month 1 — Attention Architecture
pages.content: Program content, weekly checklists, coach notes

pages.title: Month 2 — Flow State Engineering
pages.content: Program content, weekly checklists, coach notes

pages.title: Month 3 — Identity & Integration
pages.content: Program content, weekly checklists, coach notes

pages.title: Tools & Resources
pages.content: Links, software recommendations, AI tool access

pages.title: Master Dashboard
pages.content: All clients grid, adherence sorting, flags — data from GET /api/dashboard/coach

pages.title: All Clients
pages.content: List view, click to drill into individual client workspace

pages.title: Template Library
pages.content: All intervention templates, editable, usage stats

discord_bot.description: Discord.js v14 bot. Primary client interaction surface for check-ins. Reads client config from backend API. Posts results back to backend API. Delivers coach interventions.

per_client_channels.visibility: private — only that client's Discord role + coach role can see it
per_client_channels.purpose: All daily check-in activity for this client

slash_commands.description: Manually trigger a check-in prompt for a specific client
Get client's current adherence % and last check-in timestamp
Pause check-in reminders for N days
Get this week's summary for a client

check_in_flow.pm_reminder_message:
🌙 Evening Check-In — Week {{program_week}}

Hey {{name}}! End of day:
• Energy today (1–10)?
• Focus blocks completed?
• Anything blocking tomorrow's morning routine?

Optional: attach wearable screenshot 📊
on_photo_received: Step 3: Download photo, upload to Cloudflare R2, get URL
Step 4: Call Gemini Flash Vision API with photo + ai_analysis_prompt (see below)
Step 5: Parse AI response for scores and feedback text
Step 6: POST to /api/bot/checkin with all extracted data
Step 7: Backend writes to check_ins, recalculates rolling_7d_adherence, triggers alert pipeline
Step 8: Post AI feedback as reply in Discord channel
Step 9: Remove ⏳, add ✅ to original message
missed_checkin_flow: 2 hours after scheduled time with no check-in: post gentle nudge in channel
End of day with no check-in: POST /api/bot/missed-checkin → backend increments consecutive_missed_checkins, marks calendar event missed, triggers alert pipeline

discord_bot.intervention_delivery: When coach approves intervention in portal → API sets intervention.status=approved → bot polls /api/bot/pending-deliveries every 60s → posts final_message to client's discord_channel_id → bot POSTs delivery confirmation to /api/bot/delivered/:interventionId

clients.description: All active clients for master dashboard
Create client — triggers Discord channel provisioning, calendar seeding, welcome message
Update client config or protocol targets

checkins.description: Aggregated stats: adherence, avg energy, avg sleep

calendar.description: All calendar events for client — used by Affine calendar page
Reschedule missed check-in to new time

interventions.description: All pending interventions across all clients
Approve draft — sets status=approved, bot picks up on next poll

summaries.description: All weekly summaries for a client
Add/update coach notes on a summary

dashboard.description: Master view — all clients with adherence, flags, consecutive missed, last check-in
Client home — own KPIs, this week targets, recent check-ins, upcoming calendar events

bot_internal.description: Internal endpoints called only by the Discord bot using BOT_INTERNAL_API_TOKEN header. Not exposed to frontend.

endpoints.description: Resolve client record from Discord channel ID
Submit processed check-in after AI analysis — writes to check_ins, triggers alert pipeline
Report missed check-in — increments counter, marks calendar event
Get approved interventions not yet delivered — bot polls this every 60s
Confirm delivery — sets intervention.status=sent, writes discord_message_id

jobs.name: checkin_reminder_am
jobs.description: Every 15 min — find clients whose checkin_time_am falls in this 15-min window. POST AM reminder message to their Discord channel.
jobs.query: SELECT * FROM clients WHERE status='active' AND checkin_time_am BETWEEN now()::time - interval '7 min' AND now()::time + interval '7 min'

jobs.name: checkin_reminder_pm
jobs.description: Same logic for evening check-in time.
jobs.query: SELECT * FROM clients WHERE status='active' AND checkin_time_pm BETWEEN now()::time - interval '7 min' AND now()::time + interval '7 min'

jobs.name: missed_checkin_detector
jobs.description: Hourly — check for expected check-ins that never arrived. Mark as missed, increment consecutive_missed_checkins, trigger alert pipeline.
jobs.logic: For each active client, check if a scheduled check-in window passed >2 hours ago with no matching check_ins row for today. If missed: UPDATE clients SET consecutive_missed_checkins++. UPDATE calendar_events SET status='missed'. Call alert_pipeline(clientId).

jobs.name: phase_transition_check
jobs.description: Midnight — recalculate program_week for every active client. If changed, update protocol targets from program_phases and queue a phase transition intervention.
jobs.logic: program_day = CURRENT_DATE - program_start_date. program_week = CEIL(program_day / 7). If program_week changed: UPDATE clients SET (target_wake_time, target_bedtime, target_caffeine_cutoff, morning_light_duration_min, morning_exercise_time, target_peak_window) from program_phases WHERE week_number = new_week. INSERT interventions with trigger_condition='phase_transition' using INT-05 template. INSERT calendar_events type='phase_transition'.

jobs.name: weekly_summary_generator
jobs.description: Sunday 1am — aggregate each active client's week. Call Claude Sonnet for narrative. Insert weekly_summary row. Create coach notification.
jobs.logic: For each active client: SELECT check_ins for the past 7 days, aggregate stats. Build prompt with stats + client context. Call Claude Sonnet API. INSERT weekly_summaries. INSERT notifications for coach with type='weekly_summary_ready'.

jobs.name: alert_pipeline
jobs.description: Runs after every check-in POST and after every missed check-in detection. Recalculates adherence. Creates intervention if threshold breached.
jobs.logic: Recalculate rolling_7d_adherence from last 7 days of check_ins. UPDATE clients SET rolling_7d_adherence, consecutive_missed_checkins (reset to 0 if check-in received). Evaluate thresholds: if adherence < 80% OR consecutive_missed >= 2: check if pending intervention already exists — if not, select template (INT-01 through INT-04 based on condition), call Groq to personalise draft, INSERT interventions. UPDATE clients SET intervention_flag = true. INSERT notification for coach.

jobs.name: milestone_trigger
jobs.description: Daily 8am — check for clients at milestone weeks (2,4,6,8,12) who haven't received their assessment yet.
jobs.logic: SELECT clients WHERE program_week IN (2,4,6,8,12) AND status='active'. For each: check milestones table for existing row at this week. If none: queue milestone intervention using INT-08/INT-09, INSERT calendar_events type='milestone', INSERT notification for client.

jobs.name: calendar_hydrator
jobs.description: Monday midnight — pre-populate the week's check-in calendar events for all active clients.
jobs.logic: For each active client, INSERT 14 calendar_events (2 per day × 7 days) with type='checkin_scheduled', scheduled_at = date + client.checkin_time_am or checkin_time_pm.

onboarding_flow.trigger: Coach fills onboarding form at /admin/onboard in coach workspace

steps.action: Calculate chronotype from MEQ score: <42 = Evening, 42-58 = Intermediate, >58 = Morning
Create user row (BetterAuth), send client portal invite email
Create clients row with all profile data, Week 1 targets from program_phases, calculated chronotype
Bot: create private Discord channel 'checkin-{name}-{id}', create client Discord role, set permissions (client role + coach role only)
Write discord_channel_id back to clients row
Create Affine workspace for client — set affine_workspace_id on clients row
Seed client's Affine workspace pages from workspace_structure template
Run calendar_hydrator for this client — seed first week's check-in events
Bot: post welcome message to Discord channel with portal link and program start date
Create notification for coach: client onboarded and active

phase_0.name: Schema & Seed Data
phase_0.prompt: Using PRD.json as the source of truth, generate two files: (1) schema.sql — CREATE TABLE statements for all tables in database_schema, including constraints, foreign keys, and indexes on client_id and discord_channel_id. (2) seed.sql — INSERT statements for all rows in program_phases.seed_data and intervention_templates.seed_data. Nothing else.

phase_1.name: Affine Fork — Strip & Brand
phase_1.prompt: Fork the Affine repository (github.com/toeverything/AFFiNE). Remove all packages listed in affine_fork.strip_instructions.remove_packages. Disable all features in affine_fork.strip_instructions.disable_features. Keep everything in affine_fork.strip_instructions.keep. Then: (1) Replace Affine's auth system with a BetterAuth JWT integration — read session from BetterAuth on app load. (2) Add a data bridge layer: intercept all Affine page and database read/write calls and route them to NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL instead of Affine's backend. (3) Add role-based workspace routing: role=coach loads coach_workspace pages, role=client loads their own client_workspace pages. (4) Apply FlowState branding (colours, logo). The result must run with npm run dev and build with npm run build.

phase_2.name: Backend API
phase_2.prompt: Using PRD.json, implement the backend using Hono + TypeScript + Neon serverless driver (@neondatabase/serverless) + BetterAuth. Implement every endpoint in api_endpoints including bot_internal endpoints (protected by BOT_INTERNAL_API_TOKEN header check, not BetterAuth). Implement all cron jobs in automation_jobs using node-cron. Implement the alert_pipeline as a callable function triggered after check-in POST and missed-checkin events. AI calls: use Gemini Flash for photo analysis (in bot only), Groq for draft intervention personalisation, Claude Sonnet for weekly summaries. Do not build the Discord bot in this phase.

phase_3.name: Discord Bot
phase_3.prompt: Using PRD.json, implement the Discord bot using Discord.js v14. The bot must: (1) On startup, register all slash_commands. (2) Send AM and PM check-in reminders by polling /api/bot/pending-reminders (add this endpoint to backend if needed) or via an internal schedule. (3) On receiving a photo in any client channel: call GET /api/bot/client-by-channel/:channelId, upload photo to Cloudflare R2, call Gemini Flash Vision with the ai_analysis_prompt from discord_bot section, POST result to /api/bot/checkin. (4) Poll GET /api/bot/pending-deliveries every 60 seconds — for each approved intervention, post final_message to client's discord_channel_id, then PATCH /api/bot/delivered/:interventionId. (5) Implement missed check-in detection as described in check_in_flow.missed_checkin_flow.

phase_4.name: Coach Admin Workspace
phase_4.prompt: Using PRD.json affine_fork.workspace_structure.coach_workspace, implement all coach admin pages inside the stripped Affine shell. Each page fetches data from the backend API using endpoints in api_endpoints. Master Dashboard: table of all clients sorted by rolling_7d_adherence ascending, colour-coded rows (red <80%, yellow 80-90%, green >90%). Intervention Queue: list pending interventions with approve/edit/dismiss actions — approve calls PATCH /api/interventions/:id/approve. Template Library: editable list. Weekly Reports: week selector with AI narrative per client. Onboard New Client: multi-step form that POSTs to /api/clients/onboard. All routes protected by coach role check.

phase_5.name: Client Workspace
phase_5.prompt: Using PRD.json affine_fork.workspace_structure.client_workspace, implement all client portal pages inside the stripped Affine shell. Dashboard: KPI tiles + calendar widget + last 3 check-ins. Calendar page: full monthly calendar using calendar_events data from GET /api/clients/:id/calendar — green=completed, red=missed, grey=scheduled, blue=milestone/phase_transition. Progress page: recharts line charts for adherence trend, energy, focus, sleep. Check-In History: paginated log with AI feedback. Clients must only see their own data — enforce at both API level (already done in phase_2) and by routing client role to their own workspace only.

phase_6.name: Deployment
phase_6.prompt: Using PRD.json stack.deployment and environment_variables sections, generate: (1) railway.json for the backend Hono API service. (2) A separate railway.json for the Discord bot service. (3) vercel.json for the Affine frontend. (4) GitHub Actions workflow (.github/workflows/deploy.yml) that on push to main: runs tests, deploys backend + bot to Railway, deploys frontend to Vercel. (5) .env.example for each of the three services using the keys in environment_variables.
